notification.body: An A&D came through with no A&D Reason selected. Member was defaulted into the Timing nurture so they don't fall through, but the objection data is missing. Ask {{contact.patient_care_consultant}} for the real objection and set the A&D Reason field — if it isn't Timing, remove tag objection:timing and add the correct objection tag.
notification.title: A&D missing reason — {{contact.name}}

templates.name: Alert – A&D with no reason selected
Check if Sale Outcome is MUT from PCC-FORM

notification.body: {{contact.name}} was dispositioned Medically Untreatable by {{contact.patient_care_consultant}}. All marketing automation permanently suppressed. No action needed unless clinical follow-up is required.
notification.title: MUT recorded — {{contact.name}}

templates.name: Check if Sale Outcome is MAR from PCC-FORM
Update Opp – NN → hold at Showed (MAR)

notification.body: {{contact.name}} was dispositioned Medical Approval Required at Newport News by {{contact.patient_care_consultant}}. Opportunity is holding OPEN at Showed. Provider sign-off needed — once ruled, resubmit the disposition form as Sold or MUT. No automated messages will go to this member while pending.
notification.title: MAR: {{contact.name}} needs medical approval

email.html:
A PCC Sales Disposition Form was submitted for Newport News but the Sale Outcome did not match SOLD, A&D, or MUT. No opportunity was updated and no nurture fired.

Member: {{contact.name}}

Phone: {{contact.phone}}

Submitted:

Sale Outcome received: [insert the Sale Outcome merge tag from the picker]

Submitted by (PCC): [insert the PCC field merge tag]

ACTION NEEDED TODAY:

1. Open the contact and disposition manually (move the opp + apply the correct tag).

2. Check whether the form's Sale Outcome options changed, if a new option was added, the router branches need updating to match.

Contact: {{contact.name}}
email.subject: ⚠ NN Disposition NOT routed — {{contact.name}}
